=Journey to the West=
Icons for [[Journey to the West]]

==Currency==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Herb Pill}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ingot}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mending Stone}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Taoist Pill}}
|}

==Gear==
===General Gear===
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Amber Necklace}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Auspicious Cloud Gown}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Beads Necklace}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Buddhist Ring}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cloth Hat}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cloud Hat}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cloud Necklace}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cloud-walking Shoes}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cosmos Hat}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dharma Robe}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Divine Aura Ring}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Emerald Ring}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gauze Robe}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gold Flower Hat}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gold Thread Robe}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gold Thread Shoes}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Golden Organdie Robe}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Jade Dragon Hat}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Silk Boots}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ruyi Ring}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Straw Sandals}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sunchaser Boots}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|The Muni Necklace}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Thumb Ring}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Yin-yang Necklace}}
|}

===Exclusive Gear===
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Alms Bowl}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blessed Cassock}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Brocade Cassock}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Calming Rod}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cleansing Staff}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cloud Headband}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Colorful Cassock}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Crescent Spade}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ebony Rosary}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Evil Rosary}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Glass Container}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Golden Rod}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Headache Curse}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Linden Cane}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mercy Spade}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Nine-ringed Staff}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Nine-Tooth Rake}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Gold Container}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Skull Rosary}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Special Iron Rake}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Spike Rake}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Subduing Headband}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Subduing Shovel}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Traveler's Stick}}
|}

==Items==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|5-Element Veil}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Acala Statue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Acala Sutra}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Alcor Bead}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Arhat Sculpture}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Asura Sutra Frag}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Aura Fire}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Bagua Classic}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Beast Album}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Body Building Solution}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Creator Steel}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Crystal Copper}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Crystal Fire}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Deep-sea Silver}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dragon King's Remains}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Essence Cultivation Pill}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Essence Fire}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ginseng Fruit}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Glow Stone}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Golden Pill}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Good Deed}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Horsekeeper Seal}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Immortal Oil}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Immortal Peach}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Innermost Heart Rubbing}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Jade Spirit}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Liquid Sky Fire}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Monkey King Seal}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Moon Nectar}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mt Vulture Adamant}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Nether Fire}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Night Pearl}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Painting of Heaven}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Peach Feast Invitation}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Solar Fire}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Spirit Fire}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Star Silver}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Three-Realm Fire}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tome - Bhaisajyaguru Mantra}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tome - Sealing Punch}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tome - Seven Buddhas Mantra}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tome - Yamantaka}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tome of Buddhism}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Yamantaka Sutra}}
|}

== Mantras ==
=== Monke ===
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mountain Mover}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sea Breaker}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Piercing Eyes}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mayhem Maker}}
|}

=== Pigsy ===
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Heavenly Tactics}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Juicy Peach}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Eclipse Spell}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dragon Heal}}
|}

=== Sandy ===
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Crescent Spade (Mantra)}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Arhat Seal}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Acala Seal}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sealing Punch}}
|}

=== Sanzang ===
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Prajna Mantra}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Rebirth Mantra}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Innermost Heart}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dragon From Above}}
|}

== Portraits ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Monke Portrait}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Peter Portrait}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Pigsy Portrait}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Pond Frog Portrait}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sandy Portrait}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sanzang Portrait}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Unknown Creature Portrait}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Peter}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Unknown Creature}}
|}

== Sutras ==
=== Monke ===
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Stone Monkey}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Iron Bone}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Free Spirit}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|3-head Form}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|72 Transformations}}
|}

=== Pigsy ===
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Alms}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Peach Feast}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ginseng Fruit Feast}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Moon Palace Feast}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Pill Feast}}
|}

=== Sandy ===
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Crystal Bowl}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Scroll of Yamantaka}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Scroll of Acala}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Inferno}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Golden Body}}
|}

=== Sanzang ===
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Heart Sutra}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Immortality Spell}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Bhaisajyaguru Mantra}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Seven Buddhas Mantra}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Brahman}}
|}

[[Category:Bharata]]
[[Category:Icons]]
